name: Oregon
agency: Oregon Secretary of State, Corporation Division
address: 255 Capitol Street NE, Suite 151, Salem, OR 97310-1327

llc.formName: Articles of Amendment/Dissolution - Limited Liability Company
steps: Vote to dissolve according to your operating agreement or by majority vote of members
Wind up business affairs, settle debts, and distribute remaining assets
Notify all known creditors in writing
File final tax returns with the Oregon Department of Revenue
Complete the Articles of Amendment/Dissolution form (dissolution fields only)
Submit the form with $100 filing fee by mail, in person, or by fax
Cancel any business licenses, permits, and assumed business names
llc.notes: Oregon uses a combined Articles of Amendment/Dissolution form for LLCs. Fill out only the dissolution fields. The dissolution date cannot be a future date. Add $5 for an optional confirmation copy. In-person filings are processed the same day.

steps: Board of directors adopts a resolution recommending dissolution
Shareholders approve dissolution by majority vote
Notify all known creditors and claimants in writing
Wind up business affairs, settle debts, and distribute remaining assets
File final tax returns with the Oregon Department of Revenue
Complete the Articles of Dissolution form for business/professional corporations
Submit the form with $100 filing fee by mail, in person, or by fax
Cancel all business licenses and permits
corporation.notes: Corporations use a separate Articles of Dissolution form. Add $5 for an optional confirmation copy. In-person filings at the Salem office are processed the same day.

tax.notes: Oregon does not require tax clearance for dissolution. However, you must file all final state income tax returns and settle any outstanding tax obligations. Close your business tax accounts with the Department of Revenue after filing dissolution.

requirements.employeeNotification: Must comply with federal WARN Act for layoffs of 100+ employees. Provide final paychecks by end of first business day after termination (or by end of next regular payday if employee gave 48+ hours notice of quitting).
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify all known creditors and claimants in writing with a deadline to submit claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent must be maintained until dissolution is complete and all pending matters are resolved
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Entity continues to exist for purposes of winding up after dissolution per ORS 63.637
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLCs require member vote per operating agreement per ORS 63.621. Corporations require board resolution and shareholder majority approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
